tickets.title: Critical: Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) is extremely high
tickets.description: LCP was measured at 20665ms, which is significantly above the recommended 2.5s threshold for a good user experience.
tickets.impact: Severely affects user perceived loading speed and search engine rankings.
tickets.fix: Optimize the critical rendering path, prioritize the loading of the hero image, and reduce main-thread execution time by deferred non-critical JavaScript.

tickets.title: Critical: Time to Interactive (TTI) exceeds 40 seconds
tickets.description: TTI is 40478ms. This means the page takes over 40 seconds to become fully responsive to user input.
tickets.impact: Frustrates users who attempt to interact with the page before it is ready, leading to high bounce rates.
tickets.fix: Minimize main-thread work, reduce JavaScript execution time, and remove unused scripts.

tickets.title: High: Total Blocking Time (TBT) is suboptimal
tickets.description: TBT is 3672ms. Large blocking tasks are preventing the main thread from handling user interactions.
tickets.impact: Reduces the responsiveness of the UI during page load.
tickets.fix: Break up long tasks (tasks > 50ms) into smaller chunks and optimize third-party script execution.

tickets.title: Medium: Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) exceeds threshold
tickets.description: CLS is 0.112, which is above the 'Good' threshold of 0.1.
tickets.impact: Causes unexpected movement of page elements, resulting in a poor user experience.
tickets.fix: Ensure all images and dynamic elements have explicit width and height attributes or reserved space via CSS.

tickets.title: Highest: Excessive Unused JavaScript (1.5 MB)
tickets.description: The page loads approximately 1522 KB of JavaScript that is not executed during initial page load.
tickets.impact: Increases data usage, extends parsing/compilation time, and delays TTI.
tickets.fix: Implement code splitting, use dynamic imports for non-essential features, and audit third-party libraries.

tickets.title: High: Large Unused JS in '6507.js'
tickets.description: The script 'https://www.victoriassecret.com/assets/m5553-b3wLxfIJTeKsu4qBiUGbw/mobile/6507.js' contains 308 KB of unused code (60.3%).
tickets.impact: Significant contribution to main-thread bloat.
tickets.fix: Review the contents of this bundle and move non-critical functions to a deferred or on-demand script.

tickets.title: High: Large Unused JS in 'radar.min.js'
tickets.description: The vendor script 'radar.min.js' has 210 KB of unused code (83.5%).
tickets.impact: Inefficient loading of vendor functionality.
tickets.fix: Check if this SDK can be initialized only when needed or if a lighter version is available.

tickets.title: Medium: Unused JS in 'sentry-react-sdk.js'
tickets.description: Sentry SDK contains 105 KB of unused code (67.5%).
tickets.impact: Adds unnecessary weight to the JS payload.
tickets.fix: Ensure Sentry is configured to only include necessary integrations and utilize tree-shaking.

tickets.title: Medium: High Unused JS in Google Tag Manager containers
tickets.description: Multiple GTM scripts (DC-15183814, AW-870804336, etc.) are wasting between 54 KB to 60 KB each.
tickets.impact: Redundant tracking logic increases the script execution budget.
tickets.fix: Audit GTM tags and triggers; remove obsolete tags or consolidate marketing pixels.

tickets.title: High: Critical Render-Blocking CSS
tickets.description: 'style.css' is blocking the first paint by 300ms.
tickets.impact: Delays the rendering of the page content.
tickets.fix: Inline critical CSS needed for above-the-fold content and load the rest of the stylesheet asynchronously.

tickets.title: Low: Excessive Unused CSS in 'style.css'
tickets.description: 'style.css' contains 37.7 KB of unused CSS (97.6%).
tickets.impact: Increases stylesheet size and processing time.
tickets.fix: Use tools like PurgeCSS to remove unused selectors or split the CSS by component/page.

tickets.title: Medium: Offscreen images are not being lazy-loaded
tickets.description: Several images (e.g., OM_B.jpg, OF_DET.jpg) are loaded but located offscreen, wasting significant bytes.
tickets.impact: Increases initial network payload and bandwidth competition.
tickets.fix: Implement 'loading="lazy"' on all images that are not part of the initial viewport.

tickets.title: Low: Suboptimal Image Sizing (Responsive Images)
tickets.description: Image '1118220254A2_OM_B.jpg' wastes 22.3 KB due to being served larger than its displayed size.
tickets.impact: Slightly increases page weight.
tickets.fix: Use the 'srcset' attribute to serve appropriately sized images for different device resolutions.

tickets.title: High: Long Main-Thread Task - Product Mobile Index
tickets.description: A long task originating from 'product/mobile/index.js' lasted 879ms.
tickets.impact: Major contributor to TBT and poor interactivity.
tickets.fix: Refactor component logic to reduce complexity or use 'requestIdleCallback' to defer non-essential processing.

tickets.title: Medium: Long Main-Thread Task - React 18 Evaluation
tickets.description: Multiple tasks in 'react-18.js' lasted between 107ms and 471ms.
tickets.impact: Blocks the UI during hydration and component initialization.
tickets.fix: Optimize React component tree depth and use React.memo or useMemo to prevent unnecessary re-renders.

tickets.title: Medium: High Script Evaluation Time
tickets.description: Script evaluation accounts for 8940ms of the total main thread work.
tickets.impact: Primary reason for high TTI and TBT.
tickets.fix: Reduce the total amount of JS being shipped and evaluate scripts only when required.

tickets.title: Medium: Metadata - Meta Description is too long
tickets.description: The meta description is 520 characters, which exceeds the recommended ~160 character limit.
tickets.impact: Description will be truncated in search results, potentially reducing click-through rate.
tickets.fix: Rewrite meta description to be concise (between 120-160 characters).

tickets.title: Low: Metadata - Page Title is too long
tickets.description: The page title is 97 characters, which exceeds the recommended ~60 character limit.
tickets.impact: Title will be truncated in search engine results pages (SERPs).
tickets.fix: Shorten the page title to under 60 characters while keeping primary keywords.

tickets.title: Medium: Missing Image Alt Attributes
tickets.description: 2 images are missing 'alt' attributes.
tickets.impact: Negative impact on accessibility (screen readers) and image SEO.
tickets.fix: Add descriptive alt text to all elements.

tickets.title: Medium: JavaScript Runtime Error - Geolocation
tickets.description: Error: 'Failed to fetch store via geolocation: JSHandle@object'.
tickets.impact: Broken functionality for users relying on store locators.
tickets.fix: Debug the geolocation API implementation to handle denied permissions or fetch failures gracefully.

tickets.title: Low: JavaScript Runtime Error - Undefined Event
tickets.description: Error: 'Unrecognized event name: undefined'.
tickets.impact: Potential loss of analytics data and cluttering of console logs.
tickets.fix: Validate analytics event triggers to ensure event names are defined before being called.

tickets.title: Low: Font Loading Optimization
tickets.description: PublicSans fonts are loaded via CSS; ensure no invisible text during load.
tickets.impact: Presents a 'flash of invisible text' (FOIT) risk.
tickets.fix: Add 'font-display: swap;' to @font-face declarations in the CSS.

tickets.title: High: Third-Party Script Impact - Quantum Metric
tickets.description: Quantum Metric script contributed 154ms to blocking time.
tickets.impact: Reduces performance for the sake of session recording.
tickets.fix: Consider loading Quantum Metric with a delay or only on specific high-value interactions.

tickets.title: High: Third-Party Script Impact - Adobe Tag Manager
tickets.description: Adobe Tag Manager (launch-7ac2a4117ce6.min.js) significantly impacts the main thread.
tickets.impact: Adds to script evaluation overhead.
tickets.fix: Optimize rules within Adobe Launch to ensure scripts are only loaded when necessary conditions are met.
